title: Fermented Adventurous Jamaican Khus Khus Belly-Food
description: A creamy, tangy, and slightly nutty fermented Jamaican dish featuring khus khus, perfect for adventurous eaters.

ingredients.name: Mantecare Emulsifier
ingredients.notes: do not substitute with other emulsifiers

instructions: Combine khus khus and cocoa powder in a blender and blend until well combined.
Add agave syrup, coconut milk, lime juice, and fermented Jamaican hot sauce to the blender and blend until smooth.
Heat the mixture in a saucepan over low heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture thickens and emulsifies.
Remove from heat and stir in mantecare emulsifier and salt until well combined.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and garnish with fresh thyme if desired.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the flavors to meld and the mixture to chill and thicken.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
Garnish with toasted khus khus for added crunch and texture.
